case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. NOE MARDOQUEO MEJIA DE LEON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA DE LEON, NOE MARDOQUEO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA DE LEON, NOE MARDOQUEO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
